calendar.matters:
Petition To Combine And Modiry Trust.
Off Calendar May-13-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christie Fraser for Grant Schettler.

Ms. Fraser presented oral argument to support her position. The Court stated that it was prepared to amend the Trust to combine Shane and Jonah's Trust but not to go any further. The Petition is granted in part subject to a revised order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition To Combine And Modiry Trust.
Off Calendar Feb-22-2011 Continued To Mar-15-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Combine And Modiry Trust.
Off Calendar Feb-08-2011 Continued To Feb-22-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
